observations.summary: The tactile sensation of holding a solid, balanced object in Dan's hand parallels the emotional connection to his father, symbolizing a tangible link to a lost paternal figure.

source_evidence.quote: It felt right in his hand—solid, balanced, real. A connection to the man his father had been, even if that man was lost now.

observations.target_hint: This motif echoes earlier narrative descriptions of Dan's internal struggle with his father's legacy and the physical environment reflecting emotional states.

accepted_observations.summary: The tactile sensation of holding a solid, balanced object in Dan's hand parallels the emotional connection to his father, symbolizing a tangible link to a lost paternal figure.
